items.title: Coinbase Expands Crypto Lending Beyond Bitcoin, Ethereum – To Offer XRP, DOGE, ADA, LTC In ‘Everything App’ Push
items.description: The company first announced that users could borrow against their Bitcoin holdings in 2025, and expanded to Ethereum in November last year.

items.title: Qualcomm CEO Thinks India Could Be A Foundry Destination, Calls For Diversified Semiconductor Supply Chain: Report
items.description: Qualcomm’s Cristiano Amon said that outside of the U.S., one of the company's largest research and development sites is in India.
